title: 3D Chicken Eggs
description: Gives eggs a 3d model which showcases a baby chicken inside of it.
body:
The **3D chicken eggs** resource pack gives all three egg types a 3d model based on the **baby chicken** from **Tiny Takeover** gamedrop.

![Egg and the chicken](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14e27b3aaa79c56097ecfc2ea4f6c9e53db6ec38.jpeg)

Each of the egg types show a baby chicken of their corresponding variant (temperate, warm, cold)
